name: Areeba
description: Areeba — Lebanon-based payment gateway and issuing processor supporting Visa, Mastercard, and local card schemes across MENA.

seo.title: Areeba — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Areeba: Areeba — Lebanon-based payment gateway and issuing processor supporting Visa, Mastercard, and local card schemes across MENA.

when_to_use: Accepting Visa/Mastercard for e-commerce merchants in Lebanon and MENA
Processing local card schemes alongside international networks in the region
Card issuing and processing for fintech startups in MENA
Online payment gateway integration for regional retailers in Lebanon/UAE

pros: Issuing plus acquiring in one stack
review.verdict: Strong regional choice for MENA commerce, but not a global gateway contender outside its home region.
review.best_for: Merchants and fintechs targeting Lebanon, Jordan, Egypt, and Gulf markets
review.not_for: Global SaaS wanting one API covering US, EU, and APAC
